title: Cabo Frio, RJ — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Cabo Frio, RJ: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Cabo Frio is a city in RJ with a population of 234,077. A historic coastal city in the Lagos Region, famous for its crystal-clear waters, white sand beaches, and colonial salt trade history.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
